title: paspalum rawitscheri
intro: Paspalum rawitscheri, also known as the Rawitscher's paspalum, is a type of grass that belongs to the Paspalum genus, native to tropical Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anthelmintic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Paspalum rawitscheri include its ability to alleviate symptoms of fever, skin conditions, and digestive problems. It is traditionally prepared in herbal remedies such as infusions and decoctions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
